channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Cheaper, Cold‑Proof EV Battery Is Coming to Cars This Year—and It Doesn’t Use Lithium
item.description: The technology promises better cold-weather performance, lower costs, and fewer global trade problems.

item.title: Cisco CEO says all people who are wildly successful in tech share 3 traits
item.description: Technical chops matter—but Chuck Robbins says EQ and commitment to the team are what really separate top performers in the AI era.

item.title: More Than a Century Ago, Thomas Edison Imagined a Better Battery. Now Scientists Are Making It Real
item.description: Demand for power is surging, thanks to AI. Can an idea from Thomas Edison help solve the problem?

item.title: Everything you need to know about buying a car on Amazon
item.description: If you’ve been dreaming of adding a mid-sized SUV to your cart alongside a bulk pack of granola bars and a new air fryer—well, we’re not quite there y...

item.title: Demand for AI-related skills is up 109% since last year. What that means for you
item.description: AI inspired many employers to take a wait-and-see approach to hiring in 2025, but new data suggest they’ll be returning to the market in search of cer...

item.title: OpenAI hires OpenClaw AI agent developer Peter Steinberg
item.description: “Ultimately, I felt OpenAI was the best place to continue pushing on my vision and expand its reach.”

item.title: ‘Grind mode’? ‘Routine maxxing’? Social media debates the ‘best’ full-on approach to work
item.description: A viral X post from late last year pitted images depicting two hustle-culture lifestyles side by side: tech bro hoodie and Notes app icon on one side,...

item.title: Neuroscience Says This Is What Really Happens to Your Brain When You Don’t Get Enough Sleep
item.description: Don’t sleep on sleep. It’s part of what makes everything else possible.

item.title: Warner Bros. weighs reopening sale negotiations with Paramount
item.description: Paramount submitted amended terms last week that addressed several concerns.

item.title: Blackstone mogul warned of ‘urgent need’ for AI preparedness—Now he’s turning his $48 billion fortune into a top philanthropic foundation
item.description: Stephen Schwarzman is committing his wealth to his foundation, which could become one of the largest in the world.

item.title: 5 things to remember on your journey to excellence
item.description: Below, Brad Stulberg shares five key insights from his new book, The Way of Excellence: A Guide to True Greatness and Deep Satisfaction in a Chaotic W...

item.title: Rampant AI demand for memory is fueling a growing chip crisis
item.description: The cost of one type of DRAM soared 75% from December to January, accelerating price hikes throughout the holiday quarter.

item.title: Inside Author Mark Manson’s Quest to Create an AI Life Coach That Doesn’t Suck
item.description: The self-help guru is among the first to launch an AI coaching app. He won’t be the last.

item.title: 3 science-backed ways to measure integrity
item.description: Integrity, understood as a disposition to behave in prosocial, ethical, and principled ways rather than corrupt or self-serving ones, is among the str...

item.title: Struggling With Budgets? These Fast-Growth CEOs Share Their Capital-Saving Strategies That Actually Work
item.description: Saving money is key to growing your business. Here’s how successful founders have pulled it off.

item.title: Here are 7 charts guaranteed to stress you out about the stock market
The stock market is reflecting fears of an AI apocalypse for white-collar jobs
How a riptide around AI and stocks could affect Fed decisions and housing market
These ‘safer’ chip stocks have boomed this year. Is it too late to buy in?
Tax refunds are up this year, early IRS numbers show. See how yours compares.
